opportunities.specific_product: Mamma Mia waterproof stretch sofa cover
opportunities.transformation_hook: Ruined couch → showroom-fresh for $54 (pets can't stop this one)
opportunities.before_state: Couch covered in pet hair, claw marks, and mystery stains — looks like it belongs in a dumpster
opportunities.after_state: Sleek, fitted cover that looks intentional — guests ask if you got a new couch
opportunities.why_now: May is peak spring shedding season — pet owners are desperately searching for couch rescue solutions right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Best Choice Products 4-piece wicker patio conversation set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Dead backyard → outdoor living room for $329 before Memorial Day
opportunities.before_state: Bare concrete patio or mismatched, rusted chairs no one wants to sit in
opportunities.after_state: Coordinated lounge set with cushions — looks like a magazine spread, ready for summer hosting
opportunities.why_now: Memorial Day weekend (May 25) is the single biggest outdoor furniture shopping event of the year — urgency is real and immediate.

opportunities.specific_product: Modular stackable closet shelving system with drawers
opportunities.transformation_hook: $58 turned my exploding closet into a boutique — took 45 minutes
opportunities.before_state: Clothes avalanche every time the door opens — floor buried, nothing findable, constant low-grade shame
opportunities.after_state: Everything visible, folded, and color-sorted — opens and actually calms you down
opportunities.why_now: Spring cleaning searches peak in early May and closet overhaul content is earning massive saves and shares across home organization communities right now.

opportunities.specific_product: Syruvia herb stripper and multi-tool kitchen gadget set
opportunities.transformation_hook: Boring kitchen drawer → chef's toolkit for $28 — zero wasted prep time
opportunities.before_state: Junk drawer of random, useless gadgets — chopping takes forever, herbs go to waste, cooking feels like a chore
opportunities.after_state: Organized, purposeful tools that actually get used — meal prep is faster and the counter looks intentional
opportunities.why_now: Mother's Day gifting window (May 11) is open now — kitchen tool content tagged as gift ideas is spiking in saves and click-throughs.

opportunities.specific_product: Eli & Elm original side sleeper pillow
opportunities.transformation_hook: $99 pillow fixed my neck pain and I actually sleep now — wish I'd bought sooner
opportunities.before_state: Flat, formless pillow that leaves you waking up stiff with a sore neck every single morning
opportunities.after_state: Contoured support that keeps your spine aligned — wake up without reaching for ibuprofen
opportunities.why_now: Bedroom refresh content surges every May as people swap winter bedding — sleep quality Reels are among the highest-saved home content formats this month.
